columns.extraction_plan: Extract the treatment arms described in the "Abstract" and "METHODS" sections. The abstract states: "Standard-of-care (SOC) was androgen deprivation therapy." and "The comparison randomised patients 1:1 to SOC-alone with or without daily abiraterone acetate 1000 mg + prednisolone 5 mg (SOC + AAP), continued until disease progression." Value: Standard-of-care (SOC) / androgen deprivation therapy (ADT); Standard-of-care (SOC) + Abiraterone acetate + Prednisolone (AAP)
